_description: Schema reference for workspace-and-variant-specific pipeline_cards.json files. Agents read this to understand the expected structure when generating a pipeline_cards.json for a new workspace. Each UI variant of the orchestrator (e.g. flowchart, cockpit) has its own copy under workspaces/<ws>/<variant>/pipeline_cards.json. Pipeline description text is NOT stored here — see shared/pipeline_descriptions.json / schemas/pipeline_descriptions.schema.json (one copy, shared across every variant and workspace).
_generation_instructions: 1. Call list_pipelines for the target workspace, paginating until all pages are retrieved.
2. For each pipeline, fetch its source from: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BLSQ/snt_development/main/{id}/pipeline.py
3. Extract @parameter decorators top-to-bottom as the parameters array.

4. Use the OpenHEXA display name from list_pipelines as `name`. If it is just the Python function name (no human-readable name), derive one from the standard SNT naming convention and confirm with the user before building a UI card.
6. If a GitHub source returns 404, include the entry with an empty parameters array and set parameters_source to 'unavailable'.
7. If multiple instances of the same pipeline exist (duplicate Python function names), include all entries and use openhexa_code to distinguish them.

_type_mapping.str: Dropdown if choices present; text input otherwise.
_type_mapping.str+multiple: Group of checkboxes when choices present; passes an array in the config object.
_type_mapping.DHIS2Connection: Dropdown populated from workspace DHIS2 connections; pass the connection slug.
_type_mapping.CustomConnection: Dropdown populated from workspace custom connections; pass the connection slug.

_schema.generated_at: string — ISO date when this file was generated (YYYY-MM-DD)

pipelines.id: string — Python function name; stable key across workspaces
pipelines.name: string — human-readable display name for the UI card header
pipelines.uuid: string — workspace-specific pipeline UUID; NEVER copy across workspaces
pipelines.openhexa_code: string — OpenHEXA pipeline code/slug; useful when multiple instances of the same pipeline exist in one workspace

parameters.key: string — parameter key matching the @parameter decorator; used verbatim in the config object
parameters.label: string — display label
parameters.type: string — bool | int | float | str | DHIS2Connection | CustomConnection | File
parameters.multiple: boolean — omit if false; when true and type is str, the config value is an array
